summary: Hardened clone/setup portability by fixing MCP config generation placeholder resolution, aligning plugin compatibility checks with opencode.json plugin schema, and reducing false-negative setup/health failures when no scoped plugin namespace is present.
notes: generate-mcp-config now resolves {{OPENCODE_ROOT}} placeholders recursively and syncs generated config to user config home. validate-plugin-compatibility now supports plugin and plugins keys and normalizes versioned plugin specifiers. verify-setup and health-check now skip/warn (instead of fail) when scoped plugin link checks are not applicable, reducing setup friction on fresh machines.
